result.summary: MyRegistry.com exposes a public MCP server at `https://mcp.myregistry.com/mcp`; no other public developer HTTP, GraphQL, or CLI surfaces were found on the domain.
result.description: MyRegistry.com is an online gift registry and wish list service for weddings, babies, and other occasions. It lets users create and share universal registries and also offers retailer-facing gift registry software.
